title: Vanilla Style Guns
description: Weaponry stylized to follow a similar design to Vanilla added items
body:
**Vanilla Style Guns** is a mod that adds weapons styled to resemble vanilla items.
![Items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f16f5206f7db4cfde06552a145e3b10a38df50f8.png)

Items in Vanilla Style Guns:

**TNT Launcher**

![TNT Launcher](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9f6e2e763b71abd6824a808f7a4c4676844c2aa1.png)

The TNT Launcher is a weapon that launches TNT; the player must have TNT in their inventory to fire it.

The TNT Launcher is crafted with 1 TNT, 1 TNT Minecart, 4 Iron Ingots, 1 Lever, and 2 Gunpowder.

![TNT Launcher Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f1377f09439ef56277eed5c6e9dfbf5fabc6962.png)



**Slime Grenade**

![SlimeGrenade](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f27ec103d822f8add34523aedbd9e83f99fdbb3a.png)

When the Slime grenade hits the ground or an entity, it creates a box of slime around the landing point and splashes a potion of slowness.

It is crafted with 2 compressed slime (added in the mod), 1 TNT, 1 slime block, and 1 iron ingot.

![SlimeGrenadeCraftingRecipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab0dc21690a9c72218ee81ef7d65f103552e9056.png)
